## Android APK build (GitHub Actions)

Workflow: `Android APK`

### How to run

- Go to **Actions** → **Android APK** → **Run workflow**
- Choose `variant`: `debug`, `release`, or `both` (default)

### Artifacts

- `app-debug`: `app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk`
- `app-release`: `app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk` (unsigned by default in this repo)
